Petition For Instructions Approving Creditor'S Claim Of Trustee And Distribution Of Falls, Pennsylvania Real Property Pursuant To Terms Of Trust
Off Calendar Mar-25-2020 Continued To Jul-08-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Instructions Approving Creditor'S Claim Of Trustee And Distribution Of Falls, Pennsylvania Real Property Pursuant To Terms Of Trust
Off Calendar Feb-05-2020 Continued To Apr-15-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Roger Rubin for Ruth Stover (Trustee).

Mr. Rubin stated that as of last night all of the Parties have agreed to a tentative distribution, that Mr. Perry is traveling and requested a 60-day continuance so that Mr. Perry can come up with a settlement agreement that all Parties will agree on. Mr. Rubin also stated that some of the Beneficiaries are here and that some are in Pennsylvania and New York. The Petition for Instructions Approving Creditor's Claim of Trustee is continued to April 15, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Parties are to report to the Court by April 8th, whether the matter can go off calendar.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.
